purpose: Record the latest tracked local UTF-8 PDF render probe for the generated reader edition without treating the ignored PDF snapshot as a release artifact or approval.
source_commands: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --output build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8 --formats pdf

pdftotext build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8/format_artifacts/pdf/_reader_site/The-ASI-Stack.pdf - | rg -n -m 30 'Reader Source List|Proof-Carrying Circular Computation|External Citation Policy|The ASI Stack|Reader Edition Draft|evidence boundary'

render_summary.reader_render_command: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --output build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8 --formats pdf

pages_sampled.observation: Title, subtitle, and author text are readable and not clipped.
Cover image, caption, note heading, and note prose are readable and not clipped.
Opening chapter title, lead-in prose, and Problem section are readable and not clipped.
The reader source-card introduction and first Corben/local source card are readable and not clipped.
The former long-ID collision sample now wraps as source-card bullets without visible table-cell overlap.
The external source-card introduction and first external source card are readable and not clipped.
Final external citation-policy page is readable and not clipped.

layout_residuals: The generated reader PDF converts the wide Appendix G and Appendix H source tables into source cards for the reader edition; no source-table collision was observed in the sampled source-card pages.
Full page-by-page PDF layout review has not been completed.
The PDF snapshot remains an ignored local probe artifact until a future edition release record names an exact reviewed artifact.

non_claims: This manifest records a local UTF-8 PDF render probe in ignored build space only.
This manifest is not a reader release, PDF release, ebook release, edition release record, or artifact approval.
This manifest does not approve PDF, EPUB, DOCX, HTML, e-reader, document, audio, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts for publication.

This manifest does not check full editorial quality, full layout quality, e-reader behavior, app behavior, source interpretation, proof adequacy, benchmark behavior, runtime behavior, or audio output.
This manifest does not promote any claim support state.
